targets.query:
SELECT LAST("status") AS "status"
FROM "bulkTankStatusMain"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY "btNo"

SELECT LAST("availability") AS "availability",
LAST("filled") AS "filled",
LAST("percentage") AS "percentage"
FROM "bulk_tank_summary"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND $timeFilter

SELECT LAST("status") AS "statusCode" --changed from statusCode to status
FROM "mixingTankStatusMain"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY "mtNo"

SELECT LAST("status") AS "status"
FROM "coagulantTankStatusMain"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY "ctNo"

SELECT 
LAST("processValue") AS "acid_current",
LAST("LCL") AS "acid_min",
LAST("UCL") AS "acid_max",
LAST("status") AS "status"
FROM "caaChemicalStatusMain"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "chemicalType" = 'ACID'
AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY "tankNo"

SELECT 
LAST("processValue") AS "alkaline_current",
LAST("LCL") AS "alkaline_min",
LAST("UCL") AS "alkaline_max",
LAST("status") AS "status"
FROM "caaChemicalStatusMain"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "chemicalType" = 'ALKALINE'
AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY "tankNo"
